summary: This document contains Mermaid.js flowchart definitions detailing the operational workflow of the AI phone agent system. It outlines patient interaction phases including identity verification via DOB and name matching, consent management, and the handoff process to triaging staff and GPs. The diagrams illustrate the technical logic for symptom gathering and EHR integration within the NHS GP practice context.
